sections.title: A: Original word formation practice
sections.instructions: Use the word clue to form the best word for each original gap.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21. **WORD**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21.
items.answer: translation, unpredictable, expressions, speaker, information, certainty, spoken, connection, certainly, communication

sections.title: C: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21. **RECEIVED**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21. **HAVE**

The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21. **NEED**

Nina began the school club before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21. **MIGHT**
The school club ...... before the lesson on Units 19, 20 and 21.
